arts.ttl: Man Utd and Napoli swap deal for Osimhen is OFF
arts.sum: That is according to Kiss Kiss Napoli journalist Paolo Del Genio, who reports that this potential exchange is dead in the water and will not happen either in January or at the end of the season. Manchester United were discussing a potential swap deal with Napoli that would have seen Joshua Zirkzee and Victor Osimhen change clubs, but the deal is now off.

arts.ttl: Napoli’s January transfer window: Potential departures and squad reshaping
arts.sum: As Antonio Conte's Napoli sit atop the Serie A table, the club is preparing for a crucial January transfer window. The post Napoli’s January transfer window: Potential departures and squad reshaping appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter eyeing Alex Meret as potential free agent signing
arts.sum: Inter Milan is closely monitoring Alex Meret's contract situation at Napoli, considering a potential free transfer move for the Italian goalkeeper. The post Inter eyeing Alex Meret as potential free agent signing appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: NIGHTMARE Kvaratskhelia blow
arts.sum: It was revealed last month that Man Utd were ready to launch a bid for Kvaratskhelia, with the Red Devils poised to offer the Georgia winger a wage of €9 million in a ploy to get him to refuse any new contract offer from Napoli. Despite Kvaratskhelia preferring to play on the right than the left, Liverpool see him as a potential replacement for Mohamed Salah should the Egypt international depart in the summer, which looks increasingly likely after he claimed that no new contract offer has been forthcoming from the Reds.
